prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-POCKETSCALE-WC2610-5 Product Type: WEIGH_SCALE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Nugget Electronic Pocket Scale, 5-Unit Measurement Description: A convenient gold panning or gold prospecting tool to have on site in the field, the ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Portable Digital Pocket 5-Unit Measurement Weigh Scale with LCD Screen combines lightweight, compact and minimal design with high precision accuracy and functionality, that will easily fit in a backpack, jacket or bag. With automatic shut off, a bright digital display screen, tare, calibration and counting function, plus five different measurement units, this digital pocket scale will come in handy when gold prospecting in the field.

The digital pocket scale features high precision sensors that can measure in five different units including grams, ounces, tola, carat and grains; its versatility here is ideal for weighing precious metals, gems, coins or stones, but also makes the pocket scale tool a great option to employ in other professional fields like a pharmacy, jewellery store, laboratory, grocery store, farmers market, kitchen and much more.

Featuring a backlit, high contrast digital display screen, you can immediately and clearly see the weight of precious metals, gem stones or other items; the digital pocket scale also features a convenient tare or zero out calibration button, counting functions and a one-minute automatic shut-off, making it an incredibly multifunctional weighing tool to have out in the field with you when gold panning if you happen to be lucky enough to spot a nugget or gemstone in your deposit.

Units/Max capacities/Counting Functions for all Measurements:
-Grams (g)/0.0, 500g, 0pcs
-Ounces (oz)/0.000, 17oz, 25pcs
-Tola (tl)/0.00, 40Tl, 50pcs
-Carat (CT)/0.0, 2500ct, 75pcs
-Grain (GN)/0, 7716GN, 100pcs Search Terms: electronic scales kitchen gadgets gold panning supplies rush prospecting mineral lab cooking gifts travel pocket lcd digital mining tools Features: - PRECISE & ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS : The digital pocket scale features high precision sensors that can measure in five different units including grams, ounces, tola, carat and grains; its versatility here is ideal for weighing precious metals, gems, coins or stones, but also makes the pocket scale tool a great option to employ in other professional fields like a pharmacy, jewelry store, laboratory, grocery store, farmers market, kitchen and more - CONVENIENT PORTABLE SIZE: Measuring just 4.8 inches by 2.5 inches, the scale is lightweight and compact, making it easy to carry, pack or store in a jacket pocket when you're gold panning in the field; if the pocket scale is being used in a residential or commercial setting, it's small size easily fits into any drawer or can rest countertop taking up a minimal space - DIGITAL DISPLAY SCREEN, TARE & COUNTING FUNCTION: Featuring a backlit, high contrast digital display screen, you can immediately and clearly see the weight of precious metals, gem stones or other items; the digital pocket scale also features both easy to use and convenient tare or zero out calibration and counting functions - AUTOMATIC SHUT OFF: The digital pocket gold panning scale comes with an automatic one-minute shut off to prolong the battery life, conveniently saving you from having to change the batteries frequently if you, friends, family or colleagues forget to push the on/off button; also includes a clear plastic protection cover - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3.8 inches x 9.5 inches x 6 inches; Capacity: 500g maximum; Measurement Units: Grams (g), Ounces (oz), Tola (tl), Carat (ct) and Grain (gn); Battery Operated: Two (2) AAA batteries required but not included; Weighing Base Diameter: 2 inches by 2.2 inches; Weight: 3.8 ounces; Color: Silver === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Electronic Pocket Scale Silver

anthropic.title_differentiation: 5-Unit Measurement, Backlit LCD Display, Tare And Counting Function, Auto Shut-Off, Portable
